SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Alien

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Alien
public class Alien extends Object
Represents one alien enemy on the grid. Tracks position, type and wether its still alive. Also contains the Bomb class that aliens drop on players.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Alien.Bomb
    A bomb droped by an alien.
    static class 
    Alien.Boss
    The level-3 boss.
    static class 
    Alien.RadialBomb
    A bomb fired by the boss that travels outward at a fixed angle instead of straight down.

    • x

      public float x
      Horizontal center of this alien.

    • y

      public float y
      Vertical center of this alien.

    • type

      public int type
      Visual/point type: 0 = basic, 1 = medium, 2 = tough. Higher type = more points and fancier sprite details.

    • alive

      public boolean alive
      Wether this alien is still in play.

  • Constructor Details

    • Alien

      public Alien(float x, float y, int type)
      Creates an alien at a given position with a given type.
      Parameters:
      x - horizontal center
      y - vertical center
      type - 0, 1, or 2 — controls appearance and score value

  • Method Details

    • rect

      public com.badlogic.gdx.math.Rectangle rect()
      Hitbox for collision checks against bullets or players.
      Returns:
      bounding rectangle centered on this alien

    • allAliensDead

      public static boolean allAliensDead(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<Alien> aliens)
      Returns true when every alien in the given array is dead.
      Parameters:
      aliens - the current alien list
      Returns:
      true if none are alive

    • moveAliens

      public static void moveAliens(com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<Alien> aliens, AlienMoveState state, int level, int screenW)
      Moves every alive alien one step sideways (or drops them down if alienDescend is true). Flips direction after a descent. Updates alienDescend and alienDirX on the passed-in state object.
      Parameters:
      aliens - the alien list
      state - mutable movement state (dir, descend flag)
      level - current level — higher levels move an extra bit
      screenW - game screen width used for edge detection

    • drawAlien

      public static void drawAlien(Alien a, com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.glutils.ShapeRenderer shapes)
      Draws an alien using shape primitives. Different types get extra decorative bits (antennas, top knob).
      Parameters:
      a - the alien to draw
      shapes - active ShapeRenderer (already begun)
